## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructure
- [ ] docs: Documentation update
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (format + lint + typecheck + build)
- [ ] i18n: Both `en.json` and `zh.json` updated if UI text changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if applicable
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new functionality
- [ ] No emoji in UI (Lucide icons only)
